auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.googleTimeout: Connection timed out. Please try again.
auth.googleError: Failed to sign in with Google
auth.resetSentMessage: Password reset email has been sent.
auth.recoverySuccess: Password updated. You can now sign in.
auth.verifyEmailMessage: We sent a verification link to your email. Click the link to complete sign-up.

tabs.deleteMessage:
Delete "{{title}}"?
Tasks in this tab will be moved to trash.

tasks.errorTaskLimit: Task limit reached ({{count}}). Upgrade to PRO for more.
tasks.placeholderAllTab: Cannot add tasks in the All tab

trash.purgeWarning: Items are permanently deleted after 30 days

account.title: Account & Privacy
account.description: Manage privacy settings and irreversible account deletion from one place.
account.privacyPolicyDescription: Open the current policy and deletion terms.

delete.cardBody:
This permanently deletes your account and synced INA Done data.
You will lose access immediately after deletion.
delete.dataDescription: Tasks, tabs, profile settings, and trash are deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.title: Delete account
delete.body:
This permanently deletes your account and all synced INA Done data.
Type {{word}} to continue.
delete.successMessage: Your account has been removed. Returning to sign-in...
delete.errorSessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to delete your account.
delete.errorGeneric: Account deletion failed. Please try again.

menu.tip1Desc: Tap + to add a tab and tap any tab name to rename it.
menu.tip2Desc: Select a tab, type your task in the input field, then tap Add.
menu.tip3Desc: Tap a checkbox to complete a task; tap again to undo.
menu.tip4Desc: On mobile, swipe left to delete. On desktop, hover to reveal the delete icon.
menu.tip5Desc: Long-press and drag any task to rearrange its position.
menu.tip6Desc: Deleted items are kept for 30 days then permanently removed. Use the Trash icon to restore.
menu.proDesc: Unlock more tabs and tasks to maximise your productivity.
